untranslatable_reason: This is an entry signal filter and market regime descriptor, not a position sizing rule. It specifies WHEN to trade (trend-following signals + abnormal price moves + regime shifts) but contains no guidance on HOW MUCH to risk per trade, position scaling multipliers, or risk allocation percentages. The parameters provided (indicator period, standard deviations, transaction costs) describe signal quality, not position size. A sizing rule would specify risk per trade, equity fraction, or scaling mechanics—none of which are present here.
